task: Using a calculator to determine how much I can have in my 401(k) account at retirement, if I work from age 22 to 65, with an annual rate of return of 3%, annual employee contributions of $8,000, and annual employer contributions of $8,000.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Chase’s 401(k)/403(b) Retirement Calculator page, entered the requested inputs in the calculator iframe (age 22 to 65, 3% annual return, $8,000 employee contribution, $8,000 employer contribution), and the resulting estimate was visibly shown on the page as “At age 65 my 401(k)/403(b) is estimated to be worth $1,239,722.” This directly satisfies the task of using a calculator to determine the retirement account amount.
final_result_response:
I used Chase’s 401(k)/403(b) calculator with:

- Current age: 22
- Retirement age: 65
- Annual return: 3%
- Employee contribution: $8,000/year
- Employer contribution: $8,000/year

Result: **$1,239,722 estimated at age 65**.

Chase’s calculator notes this is an estimate and adjusts for deferred taxes. <citation refs="search_5fbc5ab5ec214c2b83427c4bc26ad93e#1">“Estimate your 401(k)/403(b) balance at retirement... The potential future value of your 401(k)/403(b) is adjusted to account for deferred taxes.”</citation>
action_history: Opening Chase website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.chase.com/');
Searching Chase site from page: await page.locator('e10').click();
Filling in calculator inputs: await page.locator('f2e1').fill('22');
Filling in calculator inputs: await page.locator('f2e2').fill('65');
Filling in calculator inputs: await page.locator('f2e3').fill('3');
Filling in calculator inputs: await page.locator('f2e4').fill('8000');
Filling in calculator inputs: await page.locator('f2e5').fill('8000');
